content.en:
"Father, the top power, the Fire Yang True Sect, has sent several high-level realm gods!"

Ye Xingchen came to report.

"I see!"

Ye Tian's duplicate bodies were all over the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance, so he could know that there was a high-level realm god from the outside world at the first time.

Of course, the Huoyang True Sect reported it as soon as possible, and this only arrived at the Terran Endless Realm Alliance, not an invasion.

Naturally, he didn't have to stop them, but he wouldn't go directly to them.

Huoyang True Sect is different from ordinary top forces, this top force is extremely powerful, and it is almost about to become a supreme force.

Because there are many high-level realm gods in the Huoyang True Sect, there are more than a dozen high-level peak realm gods alone.

On top of that, the Fire Yang True Sect also has two peak realm gods.

If the Huoyang True Sect had another peak realm god, "Five-Five-Three" would be qualified to become a supreme force.

A long time ago, the Huoyang True Sect tried to unite with another top force and gather three peak realm gods to advance to the supreme force, but this approach was directly vetoed by the supreme forces.

Otherwise, the Fire Yang True Sect would now be a supreme force.

Everyone knows that once it becomes a supreme force, the development of the force will be extremely rapid, and even more peak realm gods will be born.

It's a pity that one step is one step short.

Because of this, the Fire Yang True Sect was now very eager to obtain more resources.

Of course, the Huoyang True Sect already has the realm of the Boundary Seam, and under the rules of the Boundary Court Headquarters, he can only enter the realm of one Boundary Seam, but he can let other top forces enter the Endless Boundary Seam Realm, so that he can get more resources, and he also has a commission in it.

Therefore, the Huoyang True Sect was keen on this time.

For the Fire Yang True Sect, if there is a way to get more resources, they will all do it, so that they can hope to cultivate a peak realm god again.

In other words, Ye Tian was really afraid of the Huoyang True Sect, because in the past, he couldn't beat the peak realm god, even if all the copied bodies joined forces, he couldn't beat a peak realm god, and he would be easily killed by the peak realm god.

But now, he's not afraid.

After fusing the extra-dimensional things, he mastered two extra-dimensional techniques, how terrifying his combat power was, he could compete with the entire Huoyang True Sect with his own strength.

Of course, unless it is absolutely necessary, he doesn't want to expose the extradimensional technique, once it is exposed, unless the other party is killed immediately, it will be leaked, and the supreme force will inevitably come to him.

......

Inside a Terran palace.

Ye Tian met several high-level realm gods of the Huoyang True Sect here.

"Ye Tian Realm God, we are high-level realm gods from the Huoyang True Sect, and we are here to talk to the human race about the Endless Realm Seam Realm. "

The high-level realm god of the Huoyang True Sect, the Pas realm god, said.

"The Endless Seam Realm can be controlled by our human race for the time being, and the other top forces have the Boundary Seam Realm, and many of the Boundary Seam Realms are under great pressure, so letting other top forces give up the Endless Seam Realm to my Endless Seam Realm will inevitably make the situation of the other Boundary Seam Realms more dangerous, so it is better to maintain it like this for the time being. Ye Tian said.

The gods of the Pas Realm naturally wouldn't agree, the pressure on the other Realm Seam Realms is indeed very great, but the Endless Realm Seam Realm is a nascent Realm of the Rift Realm, with abundant resources, far surpassing the other Realm Crack Realms, which top force is not impressed?

As long as the benefits are big enough, no matter how big the risk is, it is worth it.

Therefore, Ye Tian's words would not make them change their minds in the slightest.

Subsequently, the high-level realm gods of the Fire Yang True Sect discussed with Ye Tian for a long time, but they could not reach a consensus.

At this time, the gods of the Paz realm were no longer polite.

"Ye Tian Realm God, your human race is not qualified to occupy an entire Boundary Rift Realm, in the Eternal Realm or the Realm God Kingdom Realm, only the Supreme Force is qualified to occupy an entire Boundary Rift Realm, and even transform the Boundary Gap Realm into a force headquarters. Even we, the Fire Yang True Sect, have to work with another top force to develop a Boundary Rift Realm. Therefore, you Terrans must give up their interests. Paz said coldly.

"What if I don't agree?"

The god of the Paz realm didn't know what to say for a while, if it was a powerful force, he could block it with a word.

But both the Human Race and the Huoyang True Sect belong to the top forces, and they are both at the same level in terms of status.

As for the human race, there are only four high-level realm gods, and the Huoyang True Sect has a bunch of high-level realm gods, which does not affect the status.

Unless the Huoyang True Sect becomes a supreme force, it is qualified to sanction the Terran Race0 .....

But they are still one step away from the supreme power, but this step is a gap. []

Of course, they still have a way to sanction the Terrans.

So, the Paz Realm God said: "Ye Heaven Realm God, if you really want to do this, our Fire Yang True Sect will initiate the final meeting of the Realm Court Headquarters, as long as most of the top forces agree at the meeting, they can sanction your human race." "

"Then, our human race will regard your Fire Yang True Sect as a mortal enemy, if you want to do this, then do it. "

"Now, send off!"

Ye Tian expelled the Paz Realm Gods and them away.

......

After leaving the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

The gods of the Paz realm were furious.

"Damn the human race, how dare you treat our Fire Yang True Sect like this, even if that Ye Tian's strength is very strong, comparable to the combat power of a high-level peak realm god, but it is only comparable to us. The god of the Paz realm said angrily.

Another high-level realm god said: "It is rumored that this Ye Heaven Realm God has multiple clones, each of which is exactly the same combat power, and many clones join forces to besiege and kill the high-level peak realm god, this is his arrogance!"

"No matter how many clones there are, they are not the opponents of the peak realm gods, if it weren't for the fact that the realm court headquarters did not allow the top forces to kill each other, the two peak realm gods of our Huoyang True Sect could kill this Ye Heaven Realm god in seconds if they dispatched one of them. The god of the Path realm said. 3.9

"What now?" asked a high-level realm god.

"Go back and report this matter to the God of the Hellfire Realm!"

The god of the Paz realm proposed.

The Hellfire Realm God is one of the two peak realm gods of the Fire Yang True Sect, and has been a peak realm god for countless years, and his strength is very strong.

Soon, they returned to the Fire Yang True Sect and met the God of the Underworld Fire Realm.

The God of the Underworld didn't want to care about this small matter, these years, he has been studying extradimensional power, and studying extradimensional power is the ultimate goal, and everything else is a small matter.

But it is a matter of the resources of the Huoyang True Sect, which will help cultivate another peak realm god, and he will also have a snack.

"I'll leave this matter to me, you don't have to worry about it!"

The Shinto of the Underworld.
